brief_notes: Thorough systematic mapping study with well-organized tables showing clear rostro-caudal gradients. The multivariate trajectory analysis is a nice methodological contribution. cFos/PHOX2B double-labeling provides important negative control for RTN engagement. Effect sizes (eta-squared) are reported consistently. The +0.6mm site emerges convincingly as the core site through convergent evidence. Small group sizes (n=5-7) limit statistical power as acknowledged.
